comments.text:
Avoid Universal Sompo car insurance!

I recently filed a claim for a minor accident that damaged my front bumper, costing ₹9,500. However, Universal Sompo accepted my claim with condition that they would only cover the bumper's cost, leaving me to bear the additional ₹5,500 for painting. They said bumper already had some scratches.

I reached out to Policybazaar, where I purchased the insurance, but they said they cant do anything.Disappointing experience with both Universal Sompo and Policybazaar.

Think twice before choosing Universal Sompo for your car insurance.

comments.text: I think, one should never buy from Dealer. They always put lower IDV and may not add all addon, this is always bad. Always choice for higher IDV value yourself. There is a misinformation that there is a fixed deduction in IDV per year, it is not so. You should demand higher IDV value for insurance so if your car get stolen or get totaled, you will get higher value. You can also take return to invoice if that is available and take lower IDV. Of course, the premium will increase but you have peace of mind for few thousand rupees more toward higher IDV or add on such as return to invoice (that is, on road price at time of purchase including insurance and RTO).
comments.author: @nitinkumar29

comments.text: Absolutely true dealers never inform about all options... Policy buyers are always ready to pay more for more security and peace of mind. But majority of dealers do not even tell about all available IDV options it's impact and also add on's available... It's best to buy a policy online..

comments.text:
The real facts about Acko . The actual facts are these/
1. Whenever a claim is raised they call you and try to put you through reimbursement claims which is a scam . The claim should be cashless and only the difference amount has to be the insured liability.
2. Reaching out to claim department is impossible . Only contact is the customer care who have limited exposure to the claims process.
3 . Every time we call customer service we are put on a scheduled callback from the claims department. This call back actual happens but it lasts only for 11 seconds . No body from the other side says anything and it is cut . We receive a message shortly after stating we tried reaching you but you were not available .
4. Because you cannot reach out to claims department it’s never clear what to do .
5. As per the policy the car is supposed to be picked up from the residence and delivered back which they definitely don’t do .
comments.author: @rockeykumar4276

comments.text:
Hi Sir, I have been following you for several months. I have recently booked a car and when I was checking the insurance premium that dealer is offering is way more higher than the quotation of the same insurance Co for the same car. Now, I told the dealer sales person I will approach to the insurance company directly. the sales persons replied that you can take it from anywhere but it should be your own responsibility, if something happens to your car then it will not be taken as priority you have to pay the parking charges etc. 
Means they will delay without any reason and I will be harassed intentionally due to delay and other payments that insurance company is not liable to pay

Please suggest what should be done in this scenario.
comments.author: @SujitDas-mn9yo

comments.text: Go ahead with your insurance. They are trying to scare you. Also if there happens to be a claim then get your car repaired at another dealer service center.
comments.author: @fullforcearun

comments.text: He is scaring you, you can take the insurance from outside through online or agent with the same company your dealer has tie up with for cashless insurance claim.
comments.author: @palashtandiya4860

comments.text:
Don't go for private company insurance especially those who are associated with the dealer........ they are supposed to make one fool.......I have 27years of bad experience with these private insurance companies........ once I was about to move to court against the ICICI L.............

comments.text: @nerdsspace.7328  If you have not availed any claim from the previous insurance company, then take a record of any such mis reporting from previous insurance company. Mean while a complaint to grievance redreesal officer (gro) of present insurance company must be lodged depicting whole issue. Wait for their reply. Then, lodge a  complaint to irdai through phone or mail and wait for the company's response. Upon no positive outcome go for insurance ombudsman.

comments.text: What is meaning of voluntary deduction?
comments.author: @mdmunir7992

comments.text:
It is an amount the customer/insured is willing to pay for the damage/repairs. The insurance company only pays the amount over and above this initial amount of customer. So what the customer promises to pay is deducted from the actual claim.
If you have promised to pay 15,000 (this is your voluntary deduction), then on a final repair bill of 40,000 the insurance co will only settle 25,000 and 15k will come from your pocket.
Choose insurance without this deductible.
comments.author: @ibelle_dragon
